name: 📧 Gmail Job Tracker
_comment: Gmail Job Tracker - monitors inbox for job-related emails. Extend this workflow by adding: IF node (filter for job keywords), Google Sheets node (log applications), Telegram node (notify you of new job emails). See README.md for full setup instructions.

_extension_ideas.step1: Add IF node: check if email subject contains keywords like 'job', 'opportunity', 'interview', 'offer'
_extension_ideas.step2: Add Google Sheets node: log job emails to a spreadsheet (Date, From, Subject, Snippet)
_extension_ideas.step3: Add Telegram node: send notification to your Telegram when a job email arrives
_extension_ideas.step4: Add Gmail node: auto-label job emails with a 'Job Applications' label
_extension_ideas.step5: Add AI Agent: summarize job email content and extract key details
